name: UBA : Multiple Sessions to Monitored Log Sources (NIS Directive)
notes: Detects more than 2 connections to same QRadar log source system within 5 minutes from a single user. QRadar Log Source IP addresses should be added to the UBA : Monitored Log Sources (NIS Directive) reference set.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same username more than 2 times
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS, Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, WinCollect
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : SIEM Addresses - IP
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same username more than 2 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same username more than 2 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Multiple Sessions to Monitored Log Sources (NIS Directive) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS, Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, WinCollect
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : SIEM Addresses - IP
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same username more than 2 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Multiple Sessions to Monitored Log Sources (NIS Directive)
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
